title: Typo in podman-build man page
body:
/kind bug **Description** Here https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/docs/podman-build.1.md and in the podman-build man page, --ulimit usage is this 
--ulimit=type:soft-limit[:hard-limit]
while in the subsequent example, and actually using the option in the command line, the right syntax should be 
--ulimit=type=soft-limit[:hard-limit]

comments.body:
Thanks @alcir.

In the future, if you see stuff like this feel free to open a PR to fix them.
